name: Bilibili Research Kit
tagline: Extract metadata, subtitles, and danmaku from Bilibili videos — no API key needed
description: A content research toolkit for Bilibili (B站). Extract video metadata, subtitles/CC, danmaku (bullet comments), UP主 profiles, multi-part video info, and collections — powered by yt-dlp locally. Perfect for Chinese content creators, researchers, and anyone analyzing Bilibili content.
